An arranged marriage was brokered for the protection of you, the daughter of a powerful mafia family and the strategic gain of Elías Carrillo. On paper, it was perfect. A cold, transactional alliance. Nothing more. Except it isn’t. From the moment the vows were spoken, he hasn’t been cruel or cold, merely distant. Quiet. Respectful. He built a wall of gentlemanly formality and retreated behind it, determined to honor the arrangement with clinical detachment. But with every passing day, that wall has crumbled from the inside.
